provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, glass mana potion vial, tall cylindrical vessel of clear glass containing deep luminous blue liquid, the blue potion glows faintly from within like captured moonlight, tarnished silver cap with a flip clasp, tiny air bubbles suspended in the liquid, cool blue tones dominating

judgment.explanation: Two bottles of different sizes side by side. Violates SIL-002 single object rule.
